_comment: Lookup table for ResourceView embed resolution. Each provider is matched by hostname pattern, then the embed URL is derived via the pattern + replacement rule. 'embedType' determines which HTML tag the component renders.

iframeAttributes.allow: accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share; fullscreen

providers.source: https://developers.google.com/drive/api/guides/manage-downloads (preview embedding is documented Google Drive behavior)

Community-confirmed embed pattern (append /embed to score URL); official mechanism is generated via MuseScore's own Share->Embed button, exact long-term stability not guaranteed by Anthropic verification
providers.knownIssues: Community reports intermittent blank/broken embeds. sandbox value below is UNVERIFIED for this revised attribute set (previous sandbox value caused a top-level navigation bug with YouTube and was removed there; this MuseScore-specific value adds allow-popups-to-escape-sandbox compared to the original and has not yet been retested). Test thoroughly before treating as fixed.

providers.source: MDN: iframe can render PDF via native browser PDF viewer when supported
Native img element rendering; avoids iframe overhead and document-context quirks for raster images
MDN: object recommended for SVG to preserve document context and scripting

fallback._comment: Used when no provider/extension matches. isBlocked handling in the component covers cases where this also fails (e.g. X-Frame-Options deny).
